name: Summer-Intern-Final-Project-NETSEC
description: Enterprise-grade network security infrastructure designed during NTI training program. Capabilities: Multi-area secure network design, VPNs, Zone-Based Firewalls, ACLs, Routing Protocols (OSPF, RIP). Impact: Implemented defense-in-depth security architecture for multi-site corporate network.

name: Vole-Machine
description: Custom virtual machine implementation built from scratch in C++. Capabilities: Memory management, custom instruction set, CPU simulation. Challenge: Understanding computer architecture at the hardware-software interface.

name: CS341-A3-CPU-Scheduler
description: Multi-algorithm CPU scheduler simulator implementing FCFS, Shortest Job First, Round Robin, and Priority scheduling. Features: Performance benchmarking, Gantt chart visualization, turnaround time analysis.

name: CS341-A1-Command-Line-Interpreter
description: Unix-like shell interpreter with advanced command parsing and process management. Capabilities: Process control, I/O redirection, pipe implementation, command parsing. Learning: OS process management and IPC.

name: CS251-Asset-Management-Zakat-Calculation-System
description: Full-stack financial management system with Islamic finance (zakat) calculation engine. Features: Asset tracking, automated zakat calculation, multi-user support. Complexity: Business logic with religious compliance requirements.
